error.signature: Null check operator used on a null value
error.regex: (Null check operator used on a null value|_CastError.*null|type.*Null.*is not a subtype of type)

verdict.summary: The ! operator was used on a null value. Variable was expected to be non-null but was null at runtime.

dead_ends.action: Add ! everywhere to make null errors go away
dead_ends.why_fails: ! is an assertion, not a fix. It just moves the crash to a different location.
Disabling null safety removes compile-time null checks and makes ALL null errors runtime crashes

workarounds.action: Use null-aware operators instead of force-unwrap
workarounds.how: value?.method()  or  value ?? defaultValue  instead of value!.method()

workarounds.action: Add null checks before the operation
Fix the source of null: check API responses, state initialization
workarounds.how: Add late keyword only when you are certain it will be initialized before use
